title: Maharashtra FYJC Admissions 2026

detail.title: Maharashtra FYJC Admissions 2026
detail.short_info: Maharashtra FYJC Admissions 2026 is now open. Fill Part 1 & Part 2 online from 11 May 2026 on mahafyicadmissions.in. Check Zero Round, CAP Round 1 schedule, merit list, allotment dates and complete admission process for Class 11th 2026-27.

content.text: Maharashtra FYJC Admissions 2026 application process is now open. The Maharashtra State Board of Secondary and Higher Secondary Education has started the Centralised Online Admission Process for First Year Junior College (FYJC) Class 11th for the academic year 2026-27.

The Directorate of Secondary and Higher Secondary Education, Maharashtra has announced the complete schedule for Maharashtra FYJC Admissions 2026. Students who have passed Class 10th can now register and fill Part 1 & Part 2 on the official portal https://mahafyicadmissions.in. The process includes Zero Round and three regular CAP Rounds along with special rounds.
Direct Link to Open Official Notification: Click Here

sections.heading: Maharashtra FYJC Admissions 2026 Important Dates (Zero Round)

rows: Display of Provisional General Merit List
Final Merit List & Zero Round Allotment
Display of Seats for First CAP Round
New Registration, Part 1 Editing & Part 2 Preference Filling
Reporting to Allotted College & Fee Payment

sections.heading: How to Apply for Maharashtra FYJC Admission 2026

items: Complete Student Registration and fill Part 1 (Personal & Academic Details).
Fill Part 2 – Choose minimum 1 and maximum 10 colleges as per preference.
Lock the preferences before the deadline.
Wait for merit list and allotment.
Report to the allotted college for document verification and fee payment.

sections.heading: Documents Required for Maharashtra FYJC Admission 2026
